name: GH_TaskCapableComponent<T>
summary: Abstract implementation of IGH_TaskCapableComponent. Inherit from this class instead of implementing IGH_TaskCapableComponent directly.

methods.name: AddedToDocument
methods.summary: Overrides the AddedToDocument method and delegates the call to all parameters.

params.name: document
params.doc: Document that now owns this object.

methods.name: AddRuntimeMessage
methods.signature: public virtual void AddRuntimeMessage(GH_RuntimeMessageLevel level, string text)
methods.summary: Add a new message to this object. Valid message type flags are Warning and Error. If the Message string is empty or zero-length no message is added.

params.name: level
params.doc: Type of message. Only Warnings and Errors are recorded.

methods.name: AfterSolveInstance
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_Component.AfterSolveInstance().)

methods.name: AppendAdditionalComponentMenuItems
methods.summary: Override this function if you want to insert some custom menu items in your derived Component class. Items will be added between List Matching items and parameter menus.

methods.name: AppendAdditionalMenuItems
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_Component.AppendAdditionalMenuItems(ToolStripDropDown).)

methods.name: AppendMenuItems
methods.summary: This function is called when a context menu is about to be displayed. Override it to set custom items. GH_ActiveObject will already populate the menu with default items, if you merely wish to insert object-specific menu item, consider overriding AppendAdditionalMenuItems instead.

returns.doc: If true, the menu will be displayed, if false the menu will be supressed.

methods.name: AppendRenderGeometry
methods.summary: Append all geometry associated with this component to a render queue.

methods.name: AssignInitCodeToInputParameter
methods.signature: protected bool AssignInitCodeToInputParameter(int paramIndex, string code)
methods.summary: Utility function for parsing and assigning init codes. This only works for standard parameter types.

params.name: paramIndex
params.doc: Index of input parameter to assign.

returns.doc: True if the code was assigned, false if otherwise.

methods.name: BakeGeometry(RhinoDoc, List<Guid>)
methods.signature: public virtual void BakeGeometry(RhinoDoc doc, List<Guid> obj_ids)
methods.summary: (Inherited from GH_Component.)

methods.name: BakeGeometry(RhinoDoc, ObjectAttributes, List<Guid>)
methods.signature: public virtual void BakeGeometry(RhinoDoc doc, ObjectAttributes att, List<Guid> obj_ids)
methods.summary: (Inherited from GH_Component.)

methods.name: BeforeSolveInstance
methods.summary: Override this method if you want to be called before the first call to SolveInstance.

methods.name: ClearData
methods.summary: Clear the data inside this component and all output parameters.

methods.name: ClearRuntimeMessages
methods.summary: Clears all runtime messages in me and my parameters

methods.name: CollectData
methods.summary: Calls CollectData on all input parameters and makes sure the Component and all associated parameters are left in a valid state.

methods.name: ComputeData
methods.summary: Compute all data and fill out all output parameters.

methods.name: CopyFrom
methods.summary: Copy all fields (except the instance ID) from another instance description.

methods.name: CreateAttributes
methods.summary: Create new attributes.
methods.remarks: Typically you do not have to override this.

methods.name: DependsOn
methods.signature: public override sealed bool DependsOn(IGH_ActiveObject potentialSource)
methods.summary: Returns True is any one of my input parameters depends on the source.

methods.name: DestroyIconCache
methods.summary: Call this method to erase the existing icon cache. You must call this if you want to change the display icon of an object.

methods.name: DocumentContextChanged
methods.signature: public override void DocumentContextChanged(GH_Document document, GH_DocumentContext context)
methods.summary: Overrides the DocumentContextChanged method and delegates the call to all parameters.

methods.name: DrawViewportMeshes
methods.summary: Draw preview meshes for this component and all associated parameters.

params.name: args
params.doc: Display data used during preview drawing.

methods.name: DrawViewportWires
methods.summary: Draw preview wires for this component and all associated parameters.

params.name: args
params.doc: Display data used during preview drawing.

methods.name: ExpireDownStreamObjects
methods.summary: Expire all objects that depend on any of the output parameters.

methods.name: ExpirePreview
methods.summary: Call this function when you suspect that the preview has expired for this object. This will cause the display cache to be eradicated.

methods.name: ExpireSolution
methods.summary: Informs the document that owns this object that the solution has expired. The current object will be set to BLANK as a result. This method is recursive, it will also expire any and all objects which depend on this object. If you want a less destructive expiration, consider using ClearData(). If this object is already Blank, you should consider not expiring it.

params.name: recompute
params.doc: If True, the document will be instructed to solve the new state.

methods.name: GenerateDefaultHTML
methods.summary: Creates the default component help topic, including all parameter lists.
methods.remarks: This formatter does not include the this-is-an-autogenerated-topic message

methods.name: GenerateParameterHelp()
methods.summary: Create an HTML string that lists names and descriptions for input and output parameters.

methods.name: GenerateParameterHelp(IGH_Param)
methods.summary: Generate HTML string for a single parameter.

methods.name: GetSolveResults
methods.signature: protected bool GetSolveResults(IGH_DataAccess access, out T data)
methods.summary: Call this method to await the associated task and retrieve its data.

params.name: data
params.doc: Data (if any) will be returned here.

returns.doc: If true, the data was successfully retrieved and can be assigned to outputs immediately. If false, the data was not found and needs to be calculated by the caller.

methods.name: GetValue(String, Boolean)
methods.signature: protected bool GetValue(string valueName, bool default)
methods.summary: Get a boolean value from the component value table.

params.name: default
params.doc: Default value to return in case of missing named value.

returns.doc: The boolean value with the given name of the default value.

methods.name: GetValue(String, Double)
methods.signature: protected double GetValue(string valueName, double default)
methods.summary: Get a double value from the component value table.

params.name: default
params.doc: Default value to return in case of missing named value.

returns.doc: The double value with the given name of the default value.

methods.name: GetValue(String, Color)
methods.signature: protected Color GetValue(string valueName, Color default)
methods.summary: Get a color value from the component value table.

params.name: default
params.doc: Default value to return in case of missing named value.

returns.doc: The color value with the given name of the default value.

methods.name: GetValue(String, Int32)
methods.signature: protected int GetValue(string valueName, int default)
methods.summary: Get an integer value from the component value table.

params.name: default
params.doc: Default value to return in case of missing named value.

returns.doc: The integer value with the given name of the default value.

methods.name: GetValue(String, String)
methods.signature: protected string GetValue(string valueName, string default)
methods.summary: Get a string value from the component value table.

params.name: default
params.doc: Default value to return in case of missing named value.

returns.doc: The string value with the given name of the default value.

methods.name: HtmlHelp_Source
methods.summary: Return a String which contains HTML formatted source for the help topic. If you want to pass a URL that points to a remote page, then prefix the URL with a GOTO: tag, like so: GOTO:http://www.YourWebAddressHere.com
methods.remarks: You can use the GUI.GH_HtmlFormatter class to generate an HTML page which conforms to Grasshopper Help standards

returns.doc: The HTML default help topic for this component including all parameters

methods.name: IsolateObject
methods.summary: Sever the connections of all input and output parameters.

methods.name: Menu_AppendBakeItem
methods.summary: Append the default Bake menu item.

methods.name: Menu_AppendEnableItem
methods.summary: Append the default Enable/Disable menu item.

methods.name: Menu_AppendObjectHelp
methods.summary: Appends the default object Help menu item.

methods.name: Menu_AppendObjectName
methods.summary: Appends the old-fashioned object name menu item. If you also want the Display mode toggle then use Menu_AppendObjectNameEx()

methods.name: Menu_AppendObjectNameEx
methods.summary: Appends the default object name + display mode menu item.

methods.name: Menu_AppendPreviewItem
methods.summary: Append the default Show/Hide preview menu item.

methods.name: Menu_AppendPublish
methods.summary: Appends the default item for publishing to RCP. This menu will only appear if the current class implement IRcpAwareObject

methods.name: Menu_AppendRuntimeMessages
methods.summary: Append the default warnings and errors menu items.

methods.name: Menu_AppendWarningsAndErrors
methods.signature: [ObsoleteAttribute("This method has been replaced by Menu_AppendRuntimeMessages()")] protected void Menu_AppendWarningsAndErrors(ToolStripDropDown menu)
methods.summary: This method is obsolete and has been replaced with Menu_AppendRuntimeMessages().

methods.name: MovedBetweenDocuments
methods.signature: public override void MovedBetweenDocuments(GH_Document oldDocument, GH_Document newDocument)
methods.summary: Overrides the MovedBetweenDocuments method and delegates the call to all parameters.

params.name: oldDocument
params.doc: Document that used to own this object.

params.name: newDocument
params.doc: Document that now owns ths object.

methods.name: NewInstanceGuid()
methods.summary: Generate a new random instance GUID

methods.name: NewInstanceGuid(Guid)
methods.summary: Set the instance ID to be a specific GUID. This is very dangerous, only use this function if you're 6"4' and your first name is David.

methods.name: OnAttributesChanged
methods.summary: Raises the AttributesChanged event on the toplevel object.

methods.name: OnDisplayExpired
methods.summary: Raises the DisplayExpired event on the toplevel object.

params.name: redraw
params.doc: If True, the canvas will be immediately redrawn.

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(String)
methods.summary: (Inherited from GH_DocumentObject.)

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(GH_ObjectChangedEventArgs)
methods.summary: (Inherited from GH_DocumentObject.)

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(GH_ObjectEventType)
methods.summary: (Inherited from GH_DocumentObject.)

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(String, Object)
methods.signature: public void OnObjectChanged(string customEvent, Object tag)
methods.summary: (Inherited from GH_DocumentObject.)

methods.name: OnObjectChanged(GH_ObjectEventType, Object)
methods.signature: public void OnObjectChanged(GH_ObjectEventType eventType, Object tag)
methods.summary: (Inherited from GH_DocumentObject.)

methods.name: OnPingDocument
methods.summary: Raise the PingDocument Event on the toplevel object and try to find the document which owns this object.

returns.doc: The document which owns this object if successful, or nothing if no document owns this object.

methods.name: OnPreviewExpired
methods.summary: Raises the PreviewExpired event on the toplevel object.

params.name: redraw
params.doc: If True, the viewports will be immediately redrawn.

methods.name: OnSolutionExpired
methods.summary: Raises the SolutionExpired event on the toplevel object. You probably want to call ExpireSolution() instead of this method directly.

params.name: recompute
params.doc: If True, the solution will be immediately recalculated.

methods.name: OnUseTasksClicked
methods.signature: public void OnUseTasksClicked(Object sender, EventArgs e)

methods.name: PostConstructor
methods.summary: The PostConstructor is called from within each constructor. DO NOT OVERRIDE THIS unless you know what you are doing.

methods.name: Read
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_Component.Read(GH_IReader).)

methods.name: ReadFull
methods.summary: GH_InstanceDescription does not by default serialize all fields. Use this function to read all fields from the archive. This method is compatible with the default Write()/Read() operations.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

methods.name: RecordUndoEvent(String)
methods.summary: Record a generic object change undo event.

returns.doc: The ID of the newly added record or Guid.Empty on failure.

methods.name: RecordUndoEvent(GH_UndoRecord)
methods.summary: Record an entire undo record.

methods.name: RecordUndoEvent(String, IGH_UndoAction)
methods.signature: public Guid RecordUndoEvent(string undoName, IGH_UndoAction action)
methods.summary: Record a specific object change undo event.

returns.doc: The ID of the newly added record or Guid.Empty on failure.

methods.name: RegisterInputParams
methods.summary: Declare all your input parameters here.

params.name: pManager
params.doc: Use the pManager to register new parameters. pManager is never null.

methods.name: RegisterOutputParams
methods.summary: Declare all your output parameters here.

params.name: pManager
params.doc: Use the pManager to register new parameters. pManager is never null.

methods.name: RegisterRemoteIDs
methods.summary: Registers all my input parameters with the UUID_LookUpTable

methods.name: RemovedFromDocument
methods.summary: Overrides the RemovedFromDocument method and delegates the call to all parameters.

params.name: document
params.doc: Document that now no longer owns this object.

methods.name: RequestTaskCancellation
methods.summary: Called by the framework when solving has been interrupted and tasks do not need to complete.

methods.name: RuntimeMessages
methods.summary: Gets the list of cached runtime messages that were recorded during solver-time processes. For components, the set of runtime messages also includes input and output parameters.

returns.doc: A list of runtime message strings.

methods.name: SDKCompliancy
methods.signature: public virtual bool SDKCompliancy(int exeVersion, int exeServiceRelease)
methods.summary: Test whether this object is compliant with a given Rhino version.

returns.doc: True if this object is compliant with the given Rhino release.

methods.name: SetIconOverride
methods.summary: Set a new custom icon override for this object.

params.name: customIcon
params.doc: Icon override. Should be a 24x24 image.

methods.name: SetValue(String, Boolean)
methods.signature: protected void SetValue(string valueName, bool value)
methods.summary: Set a named value. This value will be serialized with the component.

methods.name: SetValue(String, Double)
methods.signature: protected void SetValue(string valueName, double value)
methods.summary: Set a named value. This value will be serialized with the component.

methods.name: SetValue(String, Color)
methods.signature: protected void SetValue(string valueName, Color value)
methods.summary: Set a named value. This value will be serialized with the component.

methods.name: SetValue(String, Int32)
methods.signature: protected void SetValue(string valueName, int value)
methods.summary: Set a named value. This value will be serialized with the component.

methods.name: SetValue(String, String)
methods.signature: protected void SetValue(string valueName, string value)
methods.summary: Set a named value. This value will be serialized with the component.

methods.name: SolveInstance
methods.summary: This function will be called (successively) from within the ComputeData method of this component.

params.name: DA
params.doc: Data Access object. Use this object to retrieve data from input parameters and assign data to output parameters.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave()
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with the object_changed flag.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave(Guid)
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with the object_changed flag.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID of autosave event. Consecutive autosave requests with the same ID will be ignored.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger)
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with a custom flag.

params.name: trigger
params.doc: Reason for the autosave operation. It is possible that a user has decided to avoid autosave events for specific types, so if you can, try and provide a correct trigger flag.

methods.name: TriggerAutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger, Guid)
methods.signature: public void TriggerAutoSave(GH_AutoSaveTrigger trigger, Guid id)
methods.summary: Triggers the AutoSave function on the owner document with a custom flag.

params.name: trigger
params.doc: Reason for the autosave operation. It is possible that a user has decided to avoid autosave events for specific types, so if you can, try and provide a correct trigger flag.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID of autosave event. Consecutive autosave requests with the same ID will be ignored.

methods.name: ValuesChanged
methods.summary: Override this method if you want to respond to changes to the value table. The base implementation is empty, so you don't have to call it.

methods.name: Write
methods.summary: (Overrides GH_Component.Write(GH_IWriter).)

methods.name: WriteFull
methods.summary: GH_InstanceDescription does not by default serialize all fields. Use this function to write all fields to the archive. This method is compatible with the default Write()/Read() operations.

returns.doc: True on success, false on failure.

properties.name: Attributes
properties.summary: Gets or sets the attributes that are associated with this object. Only set custom attributes if you know what you are doing.

properties.name: Category
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Category in which this object belongs. If HasCategory() returns false, this field has no meaning.

properties.name: ClippingBox
properties.summary: Gets the clipping box for all preview geometry drawn by this component and all associated parameters.

properties.name: ComponentGuid
properties.summary: Returns a consistent ID for this object type. Every object must supply a unique and unchanging ID that is used to identify objects of the same type.

properties.name: DataComparison
properties.summary: Gets or sets the data matching algorithm for this component

properties.name: Description
properties.summary: Gets or sets the description of the object. This field typically remains fixed during the lifetime of an object.

properties.name: Exposure
properties.summary: Gets the exposure of this object in the Graphical User Interface. The default is to expose everywhere.

properties.name: HasCategory
properties.summary: Gets whether or not the Category field has been set.

properties.name: HasSubCategory
properties.summary: Gets whether or not the SubCategory field has been set.

properties.name: HelpDescription
properties.summary: Override this method if you want the help topic content to be more than the Component description.

properties.name: Hidden
properties.summary: Gets or sets the hidden flag for this component. Does not affect Hidden flags on parameters associated with this component.

properties.name: Icon
properties.summary: Override this function to supply a custom icon (24x24 pixels). The result of this property is cached, so don't worry if icon retrieval is not very fast.

properties.name: Icon_24x24
properties.summary: The icon associated with this object.

properties.name: Icon_24x24_Locked
properties.summary: The greyscale icon of this object.

properties.name: IconCapableUI
properties.summary: By default the NickName menu item supports the Icon Mode override toggle. If your UI is not capable of displaying icons, then override this property and return False.

properties.name: IconDisplayMode
properties.summary: Gets the current display mode of the object.

properties.name: InConstructor
properties.summary: Gets the constructor flag for this instance. If InConstructor = True, it means the component is still registering parameters and the layout is not yet complete.

properties.name: InPreSolve
properties.summary: Is set to True by the framework right before a "use tasks" pass is made on SolveIntance calls. When True, SolveInstance should be using Tasks to start calculations on input data. When False, SolveInstance should be setting the output data by either using the result of a task or directly computing the results.

properties.name: InstanceDescription
properties.summary: (Overrides GH_Component.InstanceDescription.)

properties.name: InstanceGuid
properties.summary: Gets the ID of this runtime instance.

properties.name: IsBakeCapable
properties.summary: (Inherited from GH_Component.)

properties.name: IsDataProvider
properties.summary: Components are never Data providers. Only the output parameters can be considered to be providers.

properties.name: IsPreviewCapable
properties.summary: If a single parameter is PreviewCapable, so is the component. Override this property if you need special Preview flags.

properties.name: IsValidPrincipalParameterIndex
properties.summary: Gets whether the MasterParameterIndex property identifies a valid parameter.

properties.name: Keywords
properties.summary: Gets a list of additional keywords that describe the object. Typically this list is empty but you can override this property to aid in object searches.

properties.name: Locked
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Locked state for this Component. This also sets locked states for all input and output parameters.

properties.name: Message
properties.summary: Gets or sets a custom message to be displayed underneath the component. This message is not serialized and should be assigned on every solution anew.

properties.name: MutableNickName
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that enables Nick name changes through the menu. The default is TRUE.

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the object. This field typically remains fixed during the lifetime of an object.

properties.name: NickName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the nickname of the object. This field can be changed by the user.

properties.name: Obsolete
properties.summary: Gets whether this object is obsolete. Default implementation returns true if the class name contains the string "OBSOLETE" or if this class has been decorated with the ObsoleteAttribute. You are free to override this if you want, but I suggest adding the ObsoleteAttribute instead.

properties.name: Params
properties.summary: Gets the parameter manager object for this component.

properties.name: Phase
properties.summary: Gets or sets the solution phase this object is currenly in.

properties.name: PrincipalParameterIndex
properties.summary: Gets or sets the principal parameter index override. Negative indices or indices larger than or equal to the input parameter count will be ignored and regular principal parameter detection will kick in.

properties.name: ProcessorTime
properties.summary: Gets the total processor time (profiler) spend by this component and all input parameters.

properties.name: RunCount
properties.summary: Gets a value indicating how many times the SolveInstance method was called on this component during the last solution. This property will return -1 if no valid runcount is available.

properties.name: RuntimeMessageLevel
properties.summary: Returns the worst case runtime warning level of me and all my parameters

properties.name: SubCategory
properties.summary: Gets or sets the SubCategory in which this object belongs. If HasSubCategory() returns false, this field has no meaning.

properties.name: UseTasks
properties.summary: Returns True if the component is set to support tasks. Components can have this feature turned on/off. Note that even if UseTasks returns True, there is a chance that a multipass task based solution may not be invoked depending on if multiple calls need to be made during enumeration. You must pay attention to the value of InPreSolve during SolveInstance. The set version of this property can be called by the framework if we want to provide a technique to globally turn on/off task support for all components in a definition.

properties.name: m_attributes
properties.summary: (Inherited from GH_DocumentObject.)

events.name: AttributesChanged
events.summary: Raised whenever the number or kind of attributes changes. This event is handled by GH_Documents who subsequently wipe their attribute caches.

events.name: DisplayExpired
events.summary: Raised whenever the display (on the Canvas) of a certain object becomes invalid.

events.name: PingDocument
events.summary: Raised whenever an object needs to know which GH_Document it belongs to.

events.name: PreviewExpired
events.summary: Raised whenever the display (in the Rhino viewports) of a certain object becomes invalid.

events.name: SolutionExpired
events.summary: Raised whenever the solution of a certain object becomes invalid.
